iot.rolealias.CfnAbout:
Specifies a role alias.

Requires permission to access the [CreateRoleAlias](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/service-authorization/latest/reference/list_awsiot.html

iot.rolealias.CredentialDurationSeconds.Description: The number of seconds for which the credential is valid.

iot.rolealias.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
